changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE leave_requests SET leave_type = 'PARENTAL' WHERE leave_type IN ('MATERNITY', 'PATERNITY')

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE leave_balances SET leave_type = 'PARENTAL' WHERE leave_type = 'MATERNITY' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM leave_balances lb2 WHERE lb2.company_id = leave_balances.company_id AND lb2.employee_id = leave_balances.employee_id AND lb2.year = leave_balances.year AND lb2.leave_type = 'PARENTAL' )

UPDATE leave_balances lb_parental SET used_days = lb_parental.used_days + lb_mat.used_days, total_days = GREATEST(lb_parental.total_days, lb_mat.total_days) FROM leave_balances lb_mat WHERE lb_mat.company_id = lb_parental.company_id AND lb_mat.employee_id = lb_parental.employee_id AND lb_mat.year = lb_parental.year AND lb_mat.leave_type = 'MATERNITY' AND lb_parental.leave_type = 'PARENTAL'

UPDATE leave_balances SET leave_type = 'PARENTAL' WHERE leave_type = 'PATERNITY' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM leave_balances lb2 WHERE lb2.company_id = leave_balances.company_id AND lb2.employee_id = leave_balances.employee_id AND lb2.year = leave_balances.year AND lb2.leave_type = 'PARENTAL' )

UPDATE leave_balances lb_parental SET used_days = lb_parental.used_days + lb_pat.used_days, total_days = GREATEST(lb_parental.total_days, lb_pat.total_days) FROM leave_balances lb_pat WHERE lb_pat.company_id = lb_parental.company_id AND lb_pat.employee_id = lb_parental.employee_id AND lb_pat.year = lb_parental.year AND lb_pat.leave_type = 'PATERNITY' AND lb_parental.leave_type = 'PARENTAL'

changeSet.author: codex
codex
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE company_parental_leave_policies ADD CONSTRAINT chk_parental_leave_policy_percentage CHECK (company_paid_percentage > 0 AND company_paid_percentage <= 100)
ALTER TABLE company_parental_leave_policies ADD CONSTRAINT chk_parental_leave_policy_max_days CHECK (max_company_paid_days > 0)
